understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to solve each KA59 level by moving the available selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' in the semantic grid is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; once all goals are covered simultaneously the level reports WIN, and completing all levels wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions were issued as CLICKs on grid coordinates. A CLICK either selected a piece (when clicking a selectable piece) or attempted to move the currently selected piece toward/into the clicked target tile; if the path/target was blocked by walls/obstacles or an immovable situation, the piece did not move and the action still consumed a step. Pieces could slide or move along open cells depending on the level’s rules, but movement was constrained by blocking tiles and potentially other pieces; selection persisted between clicks until changed by clicking another piece, and every attempted move/interaction reduced the remaining step budget.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 1/2 failed after 64 turns. Restarting the same level.
Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
